reference: I am nineteen years old and my boyfriend is twenty-one. We had sexual intercourse on the 6th of March; he did not release sperm inside. We had sexual intercourse again on the 8th, and he ejaculated inside knowingly. Within one to two hours, I took an emergency contraceptive pill. My expected period date is on the 14th, and today is the 15th. I am really very tense. Am I pregnant? Because after taking the pill, I also had no bleeding, and I am more tense that due to taking more and more tension, my periods are prolonged. Please help me, doctor.
text: I am 19 years old, and my boyfriend is 21. We had sexual intercourse on 6 March. He did not release sperm inside. We had sexual intercourse again on 8, and he ejaculated inside knowingly. Within 1 to 2 hours I took an emergency contraceptive pill. My expected period date is on the 14th, and today is the 15th. I am really very tense. Am I pregnant? Because after taking the pill I also had no bleeding, and I am more tense that due to taking more and more tension my periods are prolonged. Please help me, doctor.
